◎简　　介  

　　The British espionage drama "MI-5", provides more shocking twists and turns in its third season. Tom Quinn (Matthew Macfayden) disappears following a shooting and new man Adam Carter (Rupert Penry-Jones) rises to the challenge in Section B.
